mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP distance buckets reward inputs whose colorspace FOURCC is progressively closer to the '1CLR' constant; the gradient guides havoc mutations to the exact 4-byte signature that naive's plain edge feedback cannot sense.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient climbs FOURCC toward 1CLR switch case

mechanism_summary: VP adds CMP_MAP gradient feedback keyed by matching-prefix/Hamming-distance to the 'MCHC' FOURCC constant; inputs whose signature bytes are progressively closer to 'MCHC' are preserved and climb to the exact 4-byte match that naive cannot hit by blind havoc.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient assembles MCHC FOURCC to reach switch case

mechanism_summary: VP intercepts the 32-bit ColorSpace CMP against cmsSigMCH2Data and writes Hamming-distance buckets into CMP_MAP; inputs progressively closer to 'MCH2' are preserved, giving a gradient toward the exact FOURCC that naive's blind havoc cannot synthesize.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP Hamming gradient drives colorspace field to MCH2 switch case

mechanism_summary: VP intercepts the colorspace CMP against cmsSigMCH5Data and writes matching-prefix/Hamming distance buckets into CMP_MAP; mutations byte-closer to 'MCH5' are retained as new corpus, climbing the gradient that naive lacks.
one_line: VP matching-prefix gradient climbs colorspace field to MCH5 switch case

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient scores hex-digit range comparisons in xmlParseCharRef, preserving inputs whose bytes approach (and then exceed) the hex-digit boundary, staging the assembly of a &#x…; reference that terminates with a non-hex byte.
one_line: VP gradient stages hex charref construction up to non-hex terminator

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient intercepts the single-byte NXT(2)=='x' compare and retains inputs whose third charref byte is Hamming-closer to 0x78, driving the corpus toward the hex-charref opener that naive must discover by blind chance.
one_line: VP gradient walks single byte toward hex-charref 'x' opener

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient on digit-range comparisons rewards bytes that move into '0'-'9', driving progressively longer digit runs that eventually push the loop counter past 20, triggering the reset branch.
one_line: VP digit-range gradient grows decimal charref run past loop count threshold 20

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP distance buckets reward inputs whose font-table integer comparisons get closer to satisfying valid sfnt headers, steering the corpus toward well-formed font inputs that shape into glyphs with the UNSAFE_TO_BREAK flag set.
one_line: VP gradient steers toward valid sfnt header producing UNSAFE_TO_BREAK glyph flag

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP per-(PC, operand-distance bucket) feedback gives a Hamming/prefix-distance gradient on the codepoint==0x0D91 integer comparison, preserving near-miss codepoints until the exact value is climbed to.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient climbs codepoint integer toward 0x0D91 switch case

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards partial byte-matches on the SELECT keyword and '||' operator bytes, letting value_profile incrementally assemble the valid concatenation SQL that naive's plain edge feedback cannot build by luck.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient assembles SELECT with '||' concat operator to reach OP_Concat

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient preserves partial-progress seeds whose token/character comparisons move closer to the '.' / TK_DOT token byte, letting value_profile incrementally assemble the ID.ID dotted-reference syntax that naive's pure edge-coverage discards.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient assembles ID.ID dotted syntax to reach TK_DOT switch case

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP intercepts integer CMPs on arithmetic operands and writes distance-bucket entries; an input whose operand is closer to the true-side constant opens a new bucket and is kept, giving a gradient toward the exact value that naive must hit blindly.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient climbs arithmetic integer operand toward expression codegen true branch

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP records (PC, operand-distance-bucket) for name-resolution/wildcard-match CMPs in selectExpander; partial byte-drift toward a matching column-reference prefix opens new buckets and is retained, giving value_profile a gradient toward the qualified-wildcard expression naive only hits by luck.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient assembles qualified wildcard column reference to reach expansion true branch

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP records matching-prefix-length buckets for tokenizer/keyword CMPs; an input one byte closer to spelling SELECT and subsequent expression tokens adds a new bucket and is preserved, letting VP ratchet toward the valid SELECT-expression prefix naive cannot assemble.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP prefix-length gradient ratchets SELECT keyword bytes to reach deep parse reduction
